evals.prompt: Use Local-Deep-Research-Perplexity-Magazine-style to investigate how heat-pump adoption differs across policy evidence, installer experience, and household opinion in Europe and China. Produce a cited public-facing report.
evals.expected_output: When setup is incomplete, welcome the user, strongly recommend Exa for Agents with weak web access, explain its free allowance, provide the Exa registration/API-key URLs and resolved key-file path; then ask which optional providers and report-writing model to activate, show the required service-region notice, and execute the auditable research workflow.

evals.prompt: Research how independent game developers evaluate Steam, itch.io, and emerging Chinese distribution platforms, including official policies, developer communities, user sentiment, and commercial tradeoffs.
evals.expected_output: Ask for per-run search-provider and writer selections; plan Chinese domestic and overseas grassroots perspectives; use KimiCode and Grok Build when active and relevant; invoke Sonar Deep Research when Perplexity is active and the initial packs remain incomplete; disclose inactive-provider coverage limits.
